prompt: 这个 concept-map.svg 在浏览器里正常，但导出 PDF 后很多卡片变成黑块，箭头和 x₀/x₁ 也显示成方框。帮我修复 SVG，并说明之后怎么防止这类问题。
assertions: Identifies class-only/CSS-dependent styling as a black-fill risk.
Requires inline presentation attributes and explicit fill=none for paths.
Identifies risky glyphs and replaces them with stable Chinese/ASCII alternatives.
Recommends static validation to prevent recurrence.
